diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -2,25 +2,8 @@
 import torch.nn as nn

 import esm

 

-class AttentionPooling(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, embed_dim):

-        super().__init__()

-        self.attention = nn.Sequential(

-            nn.Linear(embed_dim, 128),

-            nn.Tanh(),

-            nn.Dropout(0.1),

-            nn.Linear(128, 1)

-        )

-        

-    def forward(self, x, mask):

-        attn_weights = self.attention(x).squeeze(-1)

-        attn_weights = attn_weights.masked_fill(mask == 0, -1e4)

-        attn_weights = torch.softmax(attn_weights, dim=-1)

-        weighted_x = torch.sum(x * attn_weights.unsqueeze(-1), dim=1)

-        return weighted_x

-

 class AAVPredictor(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, esm_model_name="esm2_t30_150M_UR50D", unfreeze_layers=1):

+    def __init__(self, esm_model_name="esm2_t12_35M_UR50D", unfreeze_layers=2):

         super().__init__()

         if esm_model_name == "esm2_t6_8M_UR50D":

             self.esm, self.alphabet = esm.pretrained.esm2_t6_8M_UR50D()

@@ -42,13 +25,20 @@
             for param in self.esm.emb_layer_norm_after.parameters():

                 param.requires_grad = True

                 

-        self.pooler = AttentionPooling(embed_dim)

-            

+        self.conv = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Conv1d(in_channels=embed_dim, out_channels=256, kernel_size=5, padding=2),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(0.1),

+            nn.Conv1d(in_channels=256, out_channels=256, kernel_size=5, padding=2),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(0.1)

+        )

+        

         self.regressor = nn.Sequential(

-            nn.Linear(embed_dim, 256),

+            nn.Linear(256, 128),

             nn.ReLU(),

             nn.Dropout(0.2),

-            nn.Linear(256, 1)

+            nn.Linear(128, 1)

         )

         

     def forward(self, tokens):

@@ -58,6 +48,14 @@
         padding_idx = self.alphabet.padding_idx

         mask = (tokens != padding_idx).float()

         

-        pooled_embeddings = self.pooler(token_representations, mask)

+        # token_representations: (batch, seq_len, embed_dim)

+        x = token_representations.transpose(1, 2) # (batch, embed_dim, seq_len)

+        x = self.conv(x)

+        x = x.transpose(1, 2) # (batch, seq_len, 256)

+        

+        sum_embeddings = torch.sum(x * mask.unsqueeze(-1), dim=1)

+        lengths = mask.sum(dim=1, keepdim=True)

+        lengths = torch.clamp(lengths, min=1e-9)

+        pooled_embeddings = sum_embeddings / lengths

         

         return self.regressor(pooled_embeddings).squeeze(-1)

--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -30,7 +30,7 @@
     

     device = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")

     

-    model = AAVPredictor("esm2_t30_150M_UR50D", unfreeze_layers=1)

+    model = AAVPredictor("esm2_t12_35M_UR50D", unfreeze_layers=2)

     model.load_state_dict(torch.load(args.checkpoint, map_location="cpu"))

     model.to(device)

     model.eval()

@@ -42,7 +42,7 @@
     

     loader = DataLoader(

         dataset, 

-        batch_size=16, 

+        batch_size=32, 

         shuffle=False, 

         collate_fn=lambda b: collate_fn(b, batch_converter),

         num_workers=4,

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -37,13 +37,13 @@
     

     device = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")

     

-    model = AAVPredictor("esm2_t30_150M_UR50D", unfreeze_layers=1)

+    model = AAVPredictor("esm2_t12_35M_UR50D", unfreeze_layers=2)

     model.to(device)

     

     train_dataset = AAVDataset(train_csv, model.alphabet)

     val_dataset = AAVDataset(val_csv, model.alphabet)

     

-    batch_size = 16

+    batch_size = 32

     train_loader = DataLoader(

         train_dataset, 

         batch_size=batch_size, 

@@ -62,15 +62,15 @@
     )

     

     esm_params = [p for p in model.esm.parameters() if p.requires_grad]

+    conv_params = [p for p in model.conv.parameters() if p.requires_grad]

     regressor_params = [p for p in model.regressor.parameters() if p.requires_grad]

-    pooler_params = [p for p in model.pooler.parameters() if p.requires_grad]

     

     optimizer = torch.optim.AdamW([

-        {'params': esm_params, 'lr': 1e-5},

-        {'params': regressor_params + pooler_params, 'lr': 1e-3}

+        {'params': esm_params, 'lr': 5e-5},

+        {'params': conv_params + regressor_params, 'lr': 1e-3}

     ], weight_decay=1e-2)

     

-    epochs = 4

+    epochs = 6

     scheduler = torch.optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=epochs * len(train_loader))

     criterion = nn.MSELoss()

     scaler = torch.cuda.amp.GradScaler()
